title: NotHighEnough
description: Increases the world height to 1024 blocks
body:
# NotHighEnough
A datapack that increases the overworld height from -64 to 1024 blocks, for a total of 1088 blocks.

### Is this datapack compatible with my world? ###
It should be compatible with any world, but backups are still recommended.

### What happens if I remove the datapack from my world? ###
Any blocks above the vanilla height limit will disappear.

### I get this annoying warning about experimental settings, can I turn it off? ###
Yes, there is a fabric and quilt mod available. See [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/here-be-no-dragons).
